message:
fix: CI failures and security hardening

CI Fixes:
- Migrate base64 0.22+ API across 6 files (prelude::* pattern)
- Fix release.yml invalid workflow reference with proper build matrix
- Fix coverage.yml duplicate --ignore-filename-regex args

Security Hardening:
- Fix path traversal in sync.rs path_to_safe_dirname (filter ParentDir)
- Change USER env var fallback from "root" to "nobody"
- Increase qr.rs recovery secret minimum from 128 to 192 bits
- Add chunk nonce overflow protection in encrypt.rs
- Add decryption chunk count validation to prevent nonce truncation
- Fix unsafe unwrap in lib.rs using already-bound timeout variable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -42,8 +42,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Generate coverage report
         run: |
           cargo llvm-cov --workspace \
-            --ignore-filename-regex "tests/" \
-            --ignore-filename-regex "benches/" \
+            --ignore-filename-regex "(tests/|benches/)" \
             --codecov \
             --output-path codecov.json
 
@@ -59,8 +58,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Generate coverage summary
         run: |
           cargo llvm-cov --workspace \
-            --ignore-filename-regex "tests/" \
-            --ignore-filename-regex "benches/" \
+            --ignore-filename-regex "(tests/|benches/)" \
             --json \
             --output-path coverage.json

@@ -6,21 +6,68 @@ on:
     tags:
       - "v*"
 
+env:
+  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+
 jobs:
+  build:
+    name: Build ${{ matrix.target }}
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    strategy:
+      matrix:
+        include:
+          - os: ubuntu-latest
+            target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
+            artifact_name: cass
+            asset_name: cass-linux-amd64
+          - os: macos-latest
+            target: x86_64-apple-darwin
+            artifact_name: cass
+            asset_name: cass-darwin-amd64
+          - os: macos-latest
+            target: aarch64-apple-darwin
+            artifact_name: cass
+            asset_name: cass-darwin-arm64
+          - os: windows-latest
+            target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
+            artifact_name: cass.exe
+            asset_name: cass-windows-amd64.exe
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Rust
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+        with:
+          targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - name: Cache cargo
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+
+      - name: Build release
+        run: cargo build --release --target ${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - name: Upload artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: ${{ matrix.asset_name }}
+          path: target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/${{ matrix.artifact_name }}
+
   release:
-    name: Release
+    name: Create Release
+    needs: build
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    permissions:
+      contents: write
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      
-      # Reuse the CI workflow logic for building artifacts
-      # In a real scenario, this might trigger the CI workflow or duplicate the build steps
-      - name: Build all targets
-        uses: ./.github/workflows/ci.yml
-      
+
+      - name: Download all artifacts
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          path: artifacts
+
       - name: Create GitHub Release
-        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1
+        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
         with:
-          files: |
-            target/*/release/cass*
+          files: artifacts/**/*
           generate_release_notes: true
